# #9967 — real device role holders (Pixel 6a, Android 16), captured live alongside the on-device test
# via: adb shell cmd role get-role-holders android.app.role.<ROLE>

HOME: com.google.android.apps.nexuslauncher
DIALER: com.google.android.dialer
SMS: com.google.android.apps.messaging
ASSISTANT: com.google.android.googlequicksearchbox

# RoleStatusInstrumentedTest.read_homeHolderMatchesTheDeviceDefaultHome asserts RoleStatus.read()'s
# home holder == PackageManager's resolved HOME activity == the value above (nexuslauncher).
